items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders now live
items.summary:
Update:

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

Okay here we go! Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live. Retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and others are at the ready to take orders on boxed copies and you won’t have to pay until later this year when it launches in November. All digital copies are expected to be live on the PS and Xbox storefronts tonight as well.

GTA 6 pre-order at Amazon on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

GTA 6 pre-order at Walmart on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

GTA 6 pre-order at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox – NOW LIVE

items.title: Best Buy’s Tech Fest Prime Day sale knocks up to $650 off all-new 2026 Copilot+ PCs with Snapdragon X2 and Ryzen AI 400 chips
items.summary: Best Buy is running a sale of its own to compete with Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day, having already kicked off its new Tech Fest event with major discounts across PCs, Apple gear, home appliances, and more. The retailer is also offering notable markdowns on Windows laptops and desktops, particularly the new 2026 Copilot+ PC models with savings of up to $650. These are the first deals we’re tracking on many of the new Windows notebooks that debuted earlier this year, sporting next-generation processors and NPUs built for AI tasks. You’ll find offers on models powered by Qualcomm’s latest Snapdragon X2 Plus, AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 series, and Intel’s Core Ultra Series 3 “Panther Lake” processors. We’ve rounded up some of the best options from the sale below, so be sure to check them out before the deals disappear.

items.title: Best Buy’s massive Tech Fest sale still live: Apple, Android, TVs, headphones, FREE credit, more
items.summary: Ahead of the official start to Prime Day 2026, Best Buy is kicking things off with its lowest prices ever on Apple Watch Series 11, and Apple Watch Ultra 3 at a wild $150 off, but there are hundreds of seriously deep deals live at Best Buy starting today.

items.title: LG offers up to $1,000 off latest 2026 TVs + $250 Visa gift cards for Prime Day: C6 and G6 OLED, more
items.summary: LG is running a particularly notable Prime Day sale of its own with as much as $1,000 off its latest 2026 smart TVs. This includes the venerable C6 and G6 OLED models at up to $700 off as well as its latest 2026 Wallpaper TVs, Micro RGB releases, and more. Prices have dropped even lower on select models since we last checked in on the sale this past weekend and LG is also seriously sweetening the offers with FREE $250 Visa gift cards you can use just about anywhere you want. Scope out the details below.

items.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 Last Call: Only hours left to save on millions of items
items.summary: Well, it has been a blast over the last 4 days, but it’s not quite over yet. If there’s anything you might need to pick up, small or large, now’s the time to do it while Prime Day 2026 is still flying for a few more hours. Some of the big-ticket tech items have disappeared now, but we are seeing listings jumping in and out of stock still and there are still thousands upon thousands of home and yard products, apparel, beauty and personal care items, and much more sitting down at Prime Day pricing for another few hours.

items.title: Fashion Weekly – Prime Day edition: New Balance, Polo Ralph Lauren, Nike, Levi’s, adidas, much more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. From top-tier fashion houses and everyday pieces for your work week, right through to super affordable pickups to freshen up your essentials, every week we scour the interwebs for the best deals on footwear and clothing to ensure you never pay full price to update your closet game. Typically we present this list on Saturday morning, but with Prime Day set to officially end later this evening, we’re getting it out there a bit earlier so you have to cash in. Head below to see all of your options.

items.title: Steals Weekly – Prime Day edition: 130W 8-in-1 charging station $28, flat 65W wall charger $10.50, tomtoc travel bag $17, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Steals Weekly – your go-to spot for already-affordable everyday essentials that are now selling for even less. This weekly roundup pulls together all of the Steals from the past week, and puts them in a digestable list for you to consume every Saturday morning. Since Prime Day has made this anything but an ordinary week, we’re publishing this on Friday instead of Saturday so you have time to scoop up offers before they vanish. Head below to see all of your options.

items.title: Last chance Apple Prime Day deals from $24: AirPods Pro 3 $70 off, Apple Watch $150 off, MacBooks up to $850 off, more
items.summary: Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day sale still has plenty of deals left in the tank before the whole thing closes down for another year, but some of the best Apple deals are already starting to sell out or jump back up in price. Fortunately, we are still tracking a solid $70 price drop on AirPods Pro 3 to deliver one of the best deals ever, as well as up to $150 off the most affordable and popular Apple Watch Series 11 models. Apple has raised the price on its current generation MacBook lineup substantially (as much as $500) but there are still some models down with Prime Day pricing at as much as much $850 under the price you’ll pay Apple (if you move fast, they are disappearing every minute). All of that and a bunch more awaits below as part of our last minute Apple Prime Day deals collection.

This sale is also the first chance to score the new Govee Matter Lantern Floor Lamp down at $99.99 shipped, matching its price directly from the brand’s website. It’s dropping down from its full price of $130 for the very first time here, giving you $30 in savings on one of the newest floor lamps from the popular brand. items.title: Score up to 50% Prime Day savings on NOCO’s popular jump starters, battery chargers, more – all from $23
items.summary: As part of Amazon’s soon-to-end Prime Day Sale, you still have time to score up to 50% discounts on NOCO’s popular lineup of car jump starters, diagnostic tools, and even some new smartphone charging stations. Among the bunch, you can find options like the popular NOCO GB40 Boost Plus Jump Starter at $75.96 shipped. This model has been a long-time favorite of mine, and its spent the entirety of 2026 keeping to its $100 full price, getting its first discount of the year during this event. You can bring it home with a $24 markdown here, landing it at the best price we have tracked since Black Friday. Head below to browse the full lineup of the brand’s deals while they last.
